items.title: Iraqi PM: Iraq and Iran are bound by historic and civilizational ties
items.summary: Tehran, IRNA – Iraqi Prime Minister Ali al-Zaidi, who has headed to Tehran for an official visit, says he will meet senior officials for talks on issues of mutual interest and regional developments, emphasizing that the two countries are bound by historic and civilizational ties.

items.title: Latest US attacks target several locations across Iran, leaving two dead and 11 injured
items.summary: Tehran, IRNA – The latest US missile and air attacks have targeted several locations across Iran, including areas in the southern and central provinces, leaving at least two people dead and 11 others injured, according to local officials.

items.title: IRGC to Jordanian, Kuwaiti peoples: US violating your countries’ sovereignty
items.summary: Tehran, IRNA – The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) says it is the United States that, through its military bases in Kuwait and Jordan, has violated the two countries’ sovereignty, emphasizing that Iran has the legal right to target aggressors and those responsible for killing its people wherever they launch attacks.

items.title: IRGC warns against using alternative routes to Strait of Hormuz after vessel catches fire
items.summary: Tehran, IRNA – The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) has warned vessels against using alternative routes to the Strait of Hormuz, saying the waterway’s entrances and exits are under its “absolute control,” after a vessel caught fire.

items.summary: Tehran, IRNA – The Chinese ambassador to Tehran says his country has always supported Iran’s efforts to defend its sovereignty and national interests, emphasizing Beijing’s willingness to play a constructive role in restoring peace and security to the West Asian region.

items.title: Iraqi envoy says Baghdad committed to deeper ties with Iran
items.summary: Tehran, IRNA – Iraq’s ambassador to Iran, Yasser Abdulzahra Al-Hajjaj, says that an upcoming visit by Iraqi Prime Minister Ali Al-Zaidi to Tehran reflects Baghdad’s commitment to expanding bilateral cooperation and strengthening coordination on issues of mutual interest.

items.title: War history is written by impact, not by number of deaths: Iran’s envoy to Trump
items.summary: London, IRNA — History of wars is written by the depth of impact, not the number of deaths, says Iran’s ambassador to Germany, in response to US President Donald Trump’s recent message comparing the war of aggression against Iran to other US wars in terms of duration and casualties.
